name: The Port Royale Smokeshop
description:
This shop is filled with the spicy aroma of pipe smoke and fresh tobacco.  
Against one wall stands a large counter.  On the counter are two small,
gilt-lettered signs, one of which lists the various pipes for sale, and the
other listing the blends of tobacco.  Behind the counter stands Jeffrey the
proprietor, observing you with a slight frown on his face.
